seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Tatyoon and Tawonga South. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Tatyoon vs Tawonga South: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Tatyoon and Tawonga South.
heading: Tatyoon vs Tawonga South — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Tatyoon, Victoria and Tawonga South, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Tatyoon has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Tawonga South (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Tatyoon or Tawonga South safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Tatyoon has a flood risk score of 21/100, while Tawonga South scores 47/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Tatyoon scores 40/100 for bushfire risk. Tawonga South scores 16/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Tatyoon or Tawonga South?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Tatyoon has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.95% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
